overview: A collection of interactive and visually rich Framer assets showcasing diverse UI/UX effects, from 3D elements and animated backgrounds to complex interactive canvases and dynamic text effects, often utilizing dark themes and vibrant accent colors.

layout.structure: Primarily full-screen, immersive experiences. Each asset typically centers its main interactive element or arranges elements in a grid/radial pattern. A common pattern is a title/description followed by the interactive component, all responsive to the viewport.
layout.grid: Often uses a single column for centered content, or implicit grids for collections of elements (e.g., Infinite Canvas). Many interactive elements are absolutely positioned for layered effects and fluidity.
layout.spacing: Minimal overall spacing, often edge-to-edge content. Textual elements typically have horizontal padding of 2rem and vertical margins for separation (e.g., 1rem-2rem). Visual elements frequently use negative margins or absolute positioning for overlapping effects.

animations.type: scale, translate, opacity changes, radial arrangement
3D rotation, depth parallax based on cursor position
peeling/curl effect with 3D transform and shadow
dynamic brightness, vertical flow, volumetric light effect using custom shader

interactions.effect: circles dynamically scale, reposition, and change opacity based on cursor proximity and movement
image shatters into multiple fragments with a 'glass break' visual and sound effect
cards rotate and shift perspective in 3D space, creating a parallax illusion
sticker lifts and curls realistically, revealing the laptop surface beneath
the entire canvas pans and zooms seamlessly, revealing an endless grid of content with a smooth transition
lines might respond to cursor position for directional changes or intensity, though not explicitly shown in video

background_effects: Various per asset: solid black for many, dynamic gradient green (CropTab), vibrant solid red (Glass Break), animated sky with realistic clouds (Sticker Peeling), and custom WebGL shader displaying animated, glowing vertical lines for a volumetric light effect (Shader Lines). Some dark backgrounds include subtle texture or noise.
special_elements: 3D floating and continuously rotating rounded rectangle component with subtle light reflections (CropTab)
Interactive radial arrangement of multiple circular image/video elements that respond to mouse input (Inner Globe)
Full-screen image with a heart-shaped overlay/mask, triggering an advanced glass-shatter effect on click (Glass Break)
Animated stack of translucent 3D cards with distinct graphics that interact with mouse movement (3D Cards)
Detailed 3D laptop model with dynamically peelable stickers that respond to mouse interaction (Sticker Peeling)
Infinite scroll/pan canvas component that allows seamless exploration through a potentially endless grid of dynamic images (Infinite Canvas)
Custom WebGL shader displaying animated, glowing vertical lines that create a deep, immersive volumetric light effect (Shader Lines)
recreation_notes: Recreating this collection demands a component-based approach, ideally with a tool like Framer, React, or Vue, leveraging modern CSS and advanced JavaScript. Each asset is a distinct, complex interactive component often requiring custom implementations. Heavy reliance on 3D transforms (CSS `transform` and potentially WebGL/Three.js for more complex 3D scenes), custom CSS properties, and advanced JavaScript (including custom shaders for effects like Shader Lines, Glass Break, and Sticker Peeling) is evident. Attention to detail in animation timing, easing functions, and responsiveness to various mouse interactions (hover, click, drag, move) is crucial. Many assets consistently embrace a dark mode aesthetic as their primary visual theme.
